person.name: Zeʼev Ṿolf ben Yozeff Zeʼev Ṿolf ben Yozeff
Yaʻaḳov Ḥayim Zelig ben Yeḥiʼel Mikhal Yaʻaḳov Ḥayim Zelig ben Yeḥiʼel Mikhal
Elʻazar Dov ben Aharon Elʻazar Dov ben Aharon
Ẓevi Hirsch ben Naphtali Herz Bialeh
Bentsiyon Mosheh Yaʼir ben Mordekhai Daṿid Ṿainshṭoḳ
Avraham Yitsḥaḳ ben Asher Enzil Avraham Yitsḥaḳ ben Asher Enzil
Ezekiel Ẓevi ben Abraham Ḥayyim Michaelson
Refaʼel Naḥman ben Barukh Shalom Hakohen
Mosheh Menaḥem Mendil ben Aharon Ṿalden
Pinḥas Zelig ben Avraham Hirsh Gliḳsman
Shelomoh Zalman ben Yosef ʻEzra Braiṭshṭain
